expectedIssues: Top nav button is missing text
reportedIssues: The yellow pill-shaped button in the top-right header appears blank, with no visible label or icon. This makes the primary action unclear.
The “SCROLL DOWN” overlay overlaps the small legal disclaimer text near the bottom of the yellow promo section, making the disclaimer difficult to read.
The legal disclaimer text is extremely small and low-density, making it nearly unreadable on mobile, especially with other elements layered over it.
The top hero BetRivers logo card appears visually clipped at the top by the header area, with only the lower rounded corners visible.
The bottom fixed navigation visually competes with the promotional content and the scroll prompt, creating a crowded bottom area.

expected.reasoning: Issue 0 describes a button in the top-right header with no visible label, matching the missing text on the top nav button.
